_use_case_note: v0 measures the 'commands' use case via a single scenario (coffee-order-happy-001). 'Conversation', 'barge-in', and 'multi-turn' use cases are not yet measured. Add scenarios in v0.2.

data_basis.harness: speko-bench-cli/agent/ (LiveKit Agents 1.5+, Cloud Run jobs in 3 regions)

weights._note: v0 weights for the commands use case. Tool-call latency and task success matter equally for voice agents driving real actions; cost is the tiebreaker. p95/stdev not in composite — surfaced as an advisory consistency_note per region.

normalization.formula: norm(x) = (max - x) / (max - min) for lower-is-better axes; norm(x) = (x - min) / (max - min) for higher-is-better axes; computed over the active candidate set after hard filters
normalization.missing_value_policy: Provider with a null axis value is normalized to 0.5 (neutral) for that axis only; flagged in scores as 'imputed: true' per axis.

scoring.tiebreaker: If composites are within 0.02, prefer lower tool_call_p50_ms. If still tied, prefer lower stdev (consistency).

providers.name: OpenAI

cost_per_minute_usd.note: $100/M input + $200/M output audio tokens. No regional endpoints for non-enterprise — server is always US.

providers.warning: europe-west3 conversational p50 = 6245ms is anomalous (~2x the other two regions). Cause unknown — possibly LiveKit europe SFU silence-detection or a Vertex-side artifact. Under investigation.

providers.name: xAI

cost_per_minute_usd.note: Public S2S/voice-agent pricing not yet listed. Standalone STT $0.10/hr batch, $0.20/hr streaming; TTS pricing in $/M chars. Treat realtime cost as imputed neutral until xAI publishes.

providers.warning: europe-west3 hit Cloud Run's 30-min task-timeout before producing data. Likely cause: high EU-to-US RTT compounded across 20 iterations. Re-run with extended timeout pending.

realtime.europe-west3.filter_reason: no data — Cloud Run task-timeout exceeded

providers.name: Google

endpoints.realtime: Vertex AI regional endpoints (vertexai=true, location parameter)

cost_per_minute_usd.note: $3.00/M input + $12.00/M output audio tokens (Gemini 2.5 Flash Live). 27x cheaper than OpenAI gpt-realtime.

vertex_region_mapping._note: Vertex Live API has no APAC region — us-west1 is the closest US-Pacific egress. EU-West3 Cloud Run runner pinned to europe-west4 Vertex (closest supported).

providers.warning: asia-southeast1 tool-call p50 = 1069ms is suspiciously low; may be a measurement artifact (LiveKit APAC SFU reading first audio frame before model finishes generating intelligible content). europe-west3 task success = 65% is below the others; under investigation.

us-east4.rationale: xAI's 1319ms tool-call p50 + 95% task success carries the latency and accuracy axes. Gemini Live wins on cost but loses on tool-call latency and task-success in this region. OpenAI is dominated on every axis here.

europe-west3.rationale: Gemini Live wins on tool-call p50 (2679ms vs 3775ms) and cost (27x cheaper). OpenAI wins task success outright (100% vs 65%). The 65% Gemini number is a flag — if the issue persists in v0.2, OpenAI should be the primary in EU-West despite the cost premium. xAI excluded (no data — Cloud Run timeout).

asia-southeast1.rationale: Gemini sweeps every axis — fastest tool-call (1069ms, with measurement-artifact caveat), tied-best task success (90%), 27x cheaper. xAI second on the latency axis. OpenAI dominated.

realtime.europe-west3.reason: no data — Cloud Run task-timeout reached before producing results; re-run with extended timeout pending

caveats.scenario_count: v0 measures one scenario (coffee-order-happy-001) which exercises a single tool call (place_order) with 2 turns. Conversational, barge-in, and multi-turn use cases are not yet measured.

providers_pending.blocker: DashScope WebSocket adapter (agent/qwen_realtime.py) connects and streams audio successfully (smoke test passed) but tool-calling is stubbed as a no-op. The coffee-order-happy scenario REQUIRES place_order, so 0/20 tool calls completed across all 3 regions. Real fix requires wiring tool calling through the DashScope WS protocol.

scoring_assumptions: xAI cost_per_minute is null — imputed as neutral 0.5 in scoring with `cost_imputed: true` flagged on those score entries. Update once xAI publishes voice-agent pricing.
Stdev / consistency is not in the composite. Surfaced for advisory only; high-stdev providers may be deprioritized via a separate advisory layer.
measurement_caveats: OpenAI gpt-realtime: server is always US (no regional endpoints for non-enterprise) — three regional numbers measure pure developer-vantage latency.
xAI Grok Voice Agent: server is US-only — same developer-vantage interpretation as OpenAI.

Gemini Live: Vertex AI exposes regional endpoints, so each Cloud Run region was routed to its closest supported Vertex region (us-east4→us-east4, europe-west3→europe-west4, asia-southeast1→us-west1 since Live API has no APAC region today). This is the only provider where regional numbers reflect actual server location.
Gemini APAC sub-second tool-call p50: deserves a follow-up — LiveKit's APAC SFU may be reading first audio frame before the model has finished generating intelligible content.
